summary: Nice soundboard capture of an all‑time great second set highlighted by Brokedown Palace, Dark Star and Uncle John’s Band.
review: The reviewer praises the board recording as “nice” and lauds the second‑set flow, calling the 55:57 stretch pure pleasure. Standout moments include a beautifully sequenced Brokedown Palace into Dark Star > Deal and an uplifting Uncle John's Band finale. No major flaws are noted, making both the performance and tape highly enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: The single detailed review gives a solid 4‑star rating, highlighting an exceptional second set and a good soundboard source; weighting show (70%) and recording (30%) yields a ~4.2 overall.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a "Nice Board" with no complaints about clarity or mix issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The second set is described as a unique, hour‑long journey with seamless transitions and an overall feeling of pure pleasure.
